    • getHostTracemeFilterMask

      public long getHostTracemeFilterMask()
      Filter mask for TraceMe events. If the traceme_filter_mask is set, a
TraceMe event will be recorded if it passes the filter.
Only lowest 32 bits of the mask are used. The higher 32 bits are reserved
and won't be applied if set.
      uint64 host_traceme_filter_mask = 1;
      Specified by:
      getHostTracemeFilterMask in interface ProfilerOptions.ProfileOptions.TraceOptionsOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The hostTracemeFilterMask.

    • setHostTracemeFilterMask

      public ProfilerOptions.ProfileOptions.TraceOptions.Builder setHostTracemeFilterMask(long value)
      Filter mask for TraceMe events. If the traceme_filter_mask is set, a
TraceMe event will be recorded if it passes the filter.
Only lowest 32 bits of the mask are used. The higher 32 bits are reserved
and won't be applied if set.
      uint64 host_traceme_filter_mask = 1;
      Parameters:
      value - The hostTracemeFilterMask to set.
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.

    • clearHostTracemeFilterMask

      public ProfilerOptions.ProfileOptions.TraceOptions.Builder clearHostTracemeFilterMask()
      Filter mask for TraceMe events. If the traceme_filter_mask is set, a
TraceMe event will be recorded if it passes the filter.
Only lowest 32 bits of the mask are used. The higher 32 bits are reserved
and won't be applied if set.
      uint64 host_traceme_filter_mask = 1;
      Returns:
      This builder for chaining.
